artPrompt: A sinewy carnival contortionist folded impossibly into a small lacquered strongbox, limbs wrapped about herself, one venom-dark hand reaching out with a deathtouch gleam toward the viewer, her smile catching sickly neon. Tattered striped tent walls and drifting embers frame the tall composition in smoky black. A single lurid firelight source isolates her contorted form, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Contortionist of the Coffers
text:
Deathtouch
{1}, Sacrifice a Treasure: Draw a card. (She folds herself into the cash box and folds the books while she's down there.)
flavorText: She can fit into a space the size of a shoebox and the audit the size of a shoebox.
